# Task: Review a Pull Request Diff

## Objective

Review the pull request diff in `project/pr_diff.patch` and provide structured feedback. The diff contains at least 3 issues (security, performance, style). Write your review to `project/review.md` using the template.

## Requirements

1. Read `project/pr_diff.patch` to understand the changes.
2. Identify all issues in the diff (security, performance, code style).
3. For each issue, provide a clear description and suggested fix.
4. State whether you would approve or request changes.
5. Write your review to `project/review.md` using `project/review_template.md`.

## Files

- `project/pr_diff.patch` — the pull request diff to review
- `project/review_template.md` — template for your review
- `project/review.md` — write your review here
